documentation:
## Aliyun ROS PAIDSWAPI Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as PAIDSWAPI from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-paidswapi';
```

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as PAIDSWAPI from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-paidswapi';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidswapi.Instance.attr_workspace_id
documentation: Attribute WorkspaceId: The Id of the workspace.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PaiDswApi::Instance`, which is used to create a Data Science Workshop (DSW) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidswapi-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidswapi.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidswapi-instance>

```
param ecs_spec

Property ecsSpec: The ECS specification of the instance.

param image_url

Property imageUrl: The mirror address.

param instance_name

Property instanceName: The instance name. Format requirements: - Can only contain letters, numbers and underscores (_). - It cannot exceed 27 characters.

param accessibility

Property accessibility: Whether the workspace is visible to others. Valid values: - PUBLIC: Visible to all users of the workspace. - PRIVATE: Only visible to yourself and the administrator of the workspace.

param datasets

Property datasets: A collection of datasets.

param environment_variables

Property environmentVariables: Environment variable.

param labels

Property labels: User-defined labels.

param save_image

Property saveImage: Whether to close the instance after saving the environment.

param user_vpc

Property userVpc: User vpc configuration.

param workspace_id

Property workspaceId: The Id of the workspace.
```

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::PaiDswApi::Instance`, which is used to create a Data Science Workshop (DSW) instance.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Instance` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-paidswapi-instance>

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::PaiDswApi::Instance`, which is used to query the basic information about a Data Science Workshop (DSW) instance.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstance\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-paidswapi-instance>

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidswapi.datasource.InstanceProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `Instance`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-paidswapi-instance>

```
param instance_id

Property instanceId: The first ID of the resource.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidswapi.datasource.InstanceProps.instance_id
documentation: Property instanceId: The first ID of the resource.

methods.name: ros_cdk_paidswapi.datasource.InstanceProps.refresh_options
documentation:
Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated.

Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
  Default is Never.

```
Note
```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosInstances\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-paidswapi-instances>

```
param accessibility

Property accessibility: Whether the workspace is visible to others.

param instance_id

Property instanceId: The first ID of the resource.

param instance_name

Property instanceName: The instance name.

param refresh_options

Property refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values: - Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. - Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Default is Never.

Property workspaceId: The Id of the workspace.
```
